latin: Scio quid velim, fili. noli me docere de carne et ovis. omne quod volo est omnis caro et omne ovum quod habes. scio quid velim.

questions.target: All the meat and eggs available
choices: All the meat and eggs available

questions.prompt: How confident is the speaker about their order?

translation: I know what I want, son. Don't teach me about meat and eggs. All I want is all the meat and every egg that you have. I know what I want.
